# Nationwide Recycling Inc

> Scrap metal recycling company offering competitive prices. Fair weight, fair price — every time.

## About

- Business: Nationwide Recycling Inc
- Type: Scrap Metal Recycler
- Location: 477 Plainfield Road, Edison, NJ 08820
- Phone: (908) 880-7055
- Email: info@nationwiderecyclinginc.com
- Hours: Mon-Fri 7:00 AM - 5:00 PM, Sat 8:00 AM - 1:00 PM, Closed Sunday
- Website: https://nationwiderecyclinginc.com

## Services

- [Scrap Metal Buying](/services/scrap-metal-buying): We buy all types of ferrous and non-ferrous scrap metals at competitive prices. Copper, aluminum, steel, brass, stainless steel, and more. Same-day payment.
- [Roll-Off Container Service](/services/container-service): Container delivery and pickup for businesses and job sites. Free delivery, multiple sizes, scheduled pickups.
- [Demolition & Cleanup](/services/demolition-cleanup): Full-service demolition and scrap removal for commercial and industrial projects.
- [E-Waste Recycling](/services/e-waste-recycling): Responsible recycling of electronic waste including computers, circuit boards, and electronic components. Data destruction available.

## Prices

Current scrap metal prices are available at [/prices](/prices).
Prices change based on market conditions. Call (908) 880-7055 for the most current rates.

### Metals We Buy

- Copper (bare bright, tubing, insulated wire)
- Aluminum (cans, sheet, cast, extrusion)
- Steel and Iron
- Brass
- Stainless Steel
- Lead
- Electronic scrap

## Frequently Asked Questions

- **What types of scrap metal do you accept?** All ferrous and non-ferrous metals including copper, aluminum, steel, iron, brass, stainless steel, lead, and more. Also electronic waste and appliances.
- **How are your prices determined?** Based on current commodity market rates, updated regularly. Prices vary by type, quality, and quantity.
- **Do you offer pickup service?** Yes, roll-off container delivery and pickup for businesses and job sites.
- **Do I need an ID to sell scrap?** Yes, valid government-issued photo ID is required for all transactions.
- **How should I prepare my scrap?** Separate by type and remove non-metal attachments for the best prices. We accept unsorted loads too.
